artifacts.summary: Deep structural analysis of irreflexivity blocker: identifies fundamental tension between countable language (needed for Cantor) and IRR freshness (needs uncountable atoms), evaluates 7 approaches (A-G), recommends conservative language extension or bulldozing

next_steps: User review needed: choose between (1) conservative extension approach (new auxiliary type, ~300-500 lines), (2) bulldozing with density management (~400-600 lines), or (3) accept sorry and prove downstream properties directly (~100 lines). Then /plan 958.
